title: Israel intercepts Hezbollah drone, strikes rocket launcher in Lebanon
snippet: Israel Hayom reports IDF intercepted a Hezbollah drone over northern Israel and struck the rocket launcher used in the Rab al-Thalathine attack. IDF called the attacks 'blatant violations' of the Lebanon ceasefire.
tag_reason: 이스라엘의 드론 요격 및 로켓 발사대 타격 등 이스라엘 측 대응 상세는 The National(src-365)에 포함되지 않은 신규 세부 정보.

entities.name: Hezbollah First Attack Since Lebanon Ceasefire (Apr 21)
